# Figma Daemon Boundaries

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/contextmapdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to context-map.md](../context-map.md)

## `node-id=156-19307`

Daemon scope: May power runtime status after a route is opened.

Not owned:

- menu labels
- ordering
- selected state
- route availability

## `node-id=162-23090`, `node-id=275-22731`

Daemon scope: Owns current-device local facts exposed by riido daemon status, health, ready, metrics, stop, logs, and start.

Not owned:

- agent hover popover
- daemon stop modal copy
- restart animation
- remote-device presentation
- SaaS devices projection
- Windows waitlist copy
- marketing consent mutation
- provider install-card hover behavior
- external provider installation links

## `node-id=432-37336`, `node-id=134-6542`, `node-id=337-24001`, `node-id=337-24013`, `node-id=432-35713`

Daemon scope: Owns only runtime execution after an already-authorized runtime binding/model/instruction is assigned.

Not owned:

- agent records
- created_at
- updated_at
- save/add button state
- member runtime selectability
- row/meatball edit entry
- absolute-time tooltip behavior
- row layout
- long-description presentation
- status-label copy/color
- model dropdown catalog

## `node-id=153-15935`

Daemon scope: Consumes only SaaS assignments that already passed target-scope policy, then controls the selected runtime.

Not owned:

- project target validation
- milestone target validation
- intake target validation
- AI property filler validation
- mention surface validation
- task/subtask target validation

Direct host-helper actions: Direct host-helper actions remain current-device local facts in C11.

Assignment authorization: SaaS assignment and daemon command authorization are upstream agent-access facts.
